controls.description: The Board of Directors must have oversight of cybersecurity risk and approve the cybersecurity strategy and policy.
controls.logic: FAIL if no board_resolution record exists approving a cybersecurity_strategy, or if last_board_review_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: A dedicated CISO or equivalent role must be formally appointed with clear responsibilities and reporting lines.
controls.logic: FAIL if no CISO role exists in the HR or roles system, or if the CISO position is vacant (incumbent = NULL).

controls.description: A formal cybersecurity policy must exist, be approved by senior management, and be communicated to all relevant personnel.
controls.logic: FAIL if cybersecurity_policy record has no approval_date, or if staff_acknowledgement_rate < 90%, or if last_update_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: A formal cybersecurity risk assessment must be conducted at least annually covering all critical financial systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if no risk_assessment record exists for the current year, or if assessment_scope excludes critical financial systems.

controls.requirement: Risk Treatment Plans Tracked to Closure
controls.description: All identified cybersecurity risks with HIGH or CRITICAL rating must have documented treatment plans with owners and deadlines.
controls.logic: FAIL if any risk record with rating IN ('HIGH','CRITICAL') has treatment_status = 'OPEN' and target_date is past due.

controls.description: The organization must maintain a compliance register tracking adherence to all SAMA cybersecurity regulatory requirements.
controls.logic: FAIL if any compliance_item record with regulator = 'SAMA' has compliance_status = 'NON_COMPLIANT' or assessment_date older than 6 months.

controls.requirement: Identity and Access Management — Privileged Accounts Controlled
controls.description: All privileged accounts must be individually authorized, monitored, and reviewed quarterly.
controls.logic: FAIL if any account with privilege_level IN ('ADMIN','SUPERUSER','ROOT') has no authorization_record, or last_review_date is older than 90 days.

controls.requirement: Multi-Factor Authentication Enforced for Critical Systems
controls.description: MFA must be enforced for access to all critical financial systems and remote access.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user with access to critical_system = TRUE has mfa_enabled = FALSE or mfa_method = 'NONE'.

controls.description: Systems must be regularly scanned for vulnerabilities. Critical vulnerabilities must be patched within defined SLAs.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system asset has last_vulnerability_scan_date older than 30 days, or if any vulnerability with severity = 'CRITICAL' has patch_status = 'OPEN' older than 15 days.

controls.requirement: Security Monitoring and SIEM in Place
controls.description: A Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) or equivalent monitoring solution must be active and collecting logs from all critical systems.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical_system has siem_log_source = FALSE or monitoring_enabled = FALSE, or if last_log_received is older than 24 hours.

controls.description: A formal cybersecurity incident response plan must exist and be tested at least annually via exercises or simulations.
controls.logic: FAIL if no incident_response_plan record exists, or if last_test_date is older than 12 months, or if last_test_result = 'FAILED'.

controls.requirement: Security Incidents Reported to SAMA Within Required Timeframe
controls.description: Significant cybersecurity incidents affecting financial operations must be reported to SAMA within the required timeframe.
controls.logic: FAIL if any incident record with severity IN ('MAJOR','CRITICAL') and regulator_notification_required = TRUE has notification_date more than 24 hours after detection_date.

controls.description: All sensitive financial data (customer data, transaction data) must be encrypted at rest and in transit.
controls.logic: FAIL if any financial_data record or transaction_record has encryption_at_rest = FALSE or encryption_in_transit = FALSE.

controls.requirement: Third-Party Vendors Assessed for Cybersecurity Risk
controls.description: All critical third-party vendors and service providers must be assessed for cybersecurity risk before and during the relationship.
controls.logic: FAIL if any vendor record with criticality = 'CRITICAL' or 'HIGH' has no cybersecurity_assessment record, or if last_assessment_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: All contracts with third-party service providers that handle financial data must include mandatory cybersecurity requirements clauses.
controls.logic: FAIL if any vendor contract with data_access = TRUE has security_clauses_included = FALSE or contract_review_date older than 24 months.
